tasks.label: Check API Routes
tasks.command: d:/smart-city/.venv/Scripts/python.exe manage.py show_urls 2>/dev/null || d:/smart-city/.venv/Scripts/python.exe manage.py shell -c "from smartCityApis.urls import urlpatterns; [print(f'{p.pattern} -> {p.callback.__name__}' if hasattr(p, 'pattern') else str(p)) for p in urlpatterns]"
